column6: description

— Ported ArrayUtils from flexmark-java: contained, append, firstOf, indexOf, lastOf, lastIndexOf, toArray — all methods faithfully translated with Scala idioms (ClassTag for array creation, Nullable for nullable returns)

CommonMark spec.txt and spec.0.26..0.30.txt are present as test resources but not loaded by any runner — ssg-md has zero CommonMark conformance tests. Only flexmark's internal ast_spec.md is run. Headline gap from docs/architecture/flexmark-port.md Gap Analysis (2026-04-07).

— Fully ported from flexmark AttributesNodeFormatter.java — all 675 lines including PhasedNodeFormatter, ExplicitAttributeIdProvider, translation span mapping, attribute uniquification, format options (sort/spacing/quotes/id/class format), consecutive attribute combination

— Fully ported from flexmark SimTocNodeFormatter.java — handles REMOVE, UPDATE, AS_IS modes with proper TocOptions creation via fromOptions, SimTocGenerateOnFormat enum, and renderTocHeaders delegation
— normalizeEOL/normalizeEndWithEOL ported from Escaping.java — CR/CRLF→LF conversion with ReplacedTextMapper tracking. Removed stale 'not yet ported' comments since Html5Entities already existed.
Nested block-quote prefix handling simplified (lines 79-84). Round-trip formatting of nested > quotes loses structure beyond one level.

withMaxRenderTimeMillis is a no-op: renderToObject never wraps in Future/ExecutorService nor checks the limit. Original Template.java enforces it via Future.get(maxRenderTimeMillis). See docs/architecture/liquid-port-gap-analysis.md §4.3.

include_relative broken from disk: Template never tracks sourceLocation nor populates REGISTRY_ROOT_FOLDER. Original Template.java setRootFolderRegistry does this. IncludeRelative cannot resolve. See gap-analysis §4.3.

Missing render API surface: render(jsonString), render(Inspectable), render(key,value,kvs*), errors() accessor, withContextHolder, toStringTree, getParseTree, render(Map,ExecutorService,bool). Port has only render()/render(JMap)/renderToObject(JMap)/renderToObjectUnguarded. See gap-analysis §4.3.
— EAGER/LAZY now differ: EAGER makes defensive copy (placeholder for LiquidSupport.objectToMap, ISS-015), LAZY passes variables through as-is matching Java's direct-return behavior
— Template now tracks templateSize (set from input.length during parse). renderToObject checks against limitMaxTemplateSizeBytes and throws RuntimeException if exceeded, matching Java original.
— Added missing withLiquidStyleWhere(Boolean) setter to TemplateParser.Builder — follows same pattern as withLiquidStyleInclude

Builder missing setters present in liqp: withDefaultTimeZone, withEnvironmentMapConfigurator, withSnippetsFolderName, withDateParser, withObjectMapper, withStripSingleLine. Port also lacks defaultTimeZone/environmentMapConfigurator/dateParser fields entirely. See gap-analysis §4.1.
— Added parse(Path), parse(File), parse(InputStream), parse(Reader) overloads to TemplateParser — all delegate to parse(String) after reading content

Self-declared stub (line 14: 'initial stub. Full implementation in Phase 4'). TemplateParser.evaluate silently returns an empty HashMap for any non-LiquidSupport input. Combined with Template.renderToObject not calling evaluate at all, Inspectable POJOs are silently dropped. See gap-analysis §4.18.

Inline 70-line rewrite missing major Jekyll/Liquid Where semantics: no dotted property paths (where: 'address.city' looks up literal key), no POJO support (only JMap+Inspectable), no nil/empty/blank literal handling, no collection-property matching, no numeric coercion of string properties. Original is 5 files (Where.java + filters/where/{Jekyll,Liquid,WhereImpl,PropertyResolverHelper,PropertyResolverAdapter}). See gap-analysis §4.11.

Only parses ISO-8601 inputs. Original ships 63 fallback patterns via filters/date/Parser.java + Ruby ordinal normalization + BasicDateParser.getZonedDateTimeFromTemporalAccessor. Inputs like 'March 1st 2024', '01/15/2024', RFC 2822, '15 Jan' no longer parse. The entire filters/date/* package is skipped. See gap-analysis §4.10.
— Added ~20 missing strftime directives: %C %D %F %G %g %V %v %N %R %r %T %c %x %X %+ %s %U %W, plus %:z/%::z/%:::z timezone variants and %0/%_ modifier flags
— Json.toJson now handles NaN/Infinity as null (valid JSON), and TemporalAccessor as quoted string. Remaining gaps (cycle detection, Inspectable) tracked separately.

— Fixed date handling: asRubyDate/asTemporal/temporalAsArray/temporalToString now handle LocalDate, LocalDateTime, OffsetDateTime, Instant, LocalTime via new toZonedDateTime helper ported from liqp BasicDateParser. No more silent fallback to now().
— asFormattedNumber now strips trailing zeros from BigDecimal fractional part (5.50→5.5) matching Java's stripTrailingZeros behavior. Uses string-level stripping for cross-platform safety.
— Include tag Jekyll branch now throws LiquidException for non-Map parameters instead of silently dropping them, matching original Java's ClassCastException behavior with a descriptive message
Missing fields/methods present in liqp: 'template' Template ref, getDateParser() (no BasicDateParser exists in port), getRootFolder() returns Any instead of Path. See gap-analysis §4.4.
— Parser now throws LiquidException with token type, value, and line number instead of silently skipping unexpected tokens

No rule-by-rule grammar coverage verification. Original LiquidParser.g4 has ~46 productions; not exhaustively mapped to Scala parser methods. At-risk rules: id-as-keyword (allows {% assign if = 1 %}), evaluateInOutputTag predicate, output-rule strict/warn/lax alternatives, error_other_tag 4 recovery branches, not_out_end / other_than_tag_end token sets.

Entire spi/* package skipped (TypesSupport, BasicTypesSupport, Java7DateTypesSupport, Java8DateTypesSupport, SPIHelper). No replacement extension mechanism for custom user types in the port. ServiceLoader doesn't work on JS/Native; design a Scala-3 typeclass replacement (given LiquidTypeSupport[T]) or formally drop SPI from scope and document. See gap-analysis §4.16.
filters/date/* skipped (5 files: BasicDateParser, Parser, FuzzyDateDateParser, CustomDateFormatRegistry, CustomDateFormatSupport). Required to fix Date filter parsing — see related Date.scala bugs.

filters/where/* skipped (5 files: WhereImpl, JekyllWhereImpl, LiquidWhereImpl, PropertyResolverAdapter, PropertyResolverHelper). Required to fix Where filter Jekyll/Liquid mode parity — see related Where.scala bug.

Test coverage ~20-30% of liqp. Port has 280 tests in 12 suites; original has 100+ test files (~1500+ assertions). Missing suites: TemplateSuite (covering render overloads, errors(), max-render-time, max-template-size, ContextHolder), DateFilterSuite, WhereFilterSuite, LValueSuite, LexerSuite, ParserSuite, NodeSuite (14 node test files in original), IncludeRelativeSuite, ProtectionSettings full coverage. See gap-analysis §6.
— Documented LIQP→JEKYLL default flavor change in migration notes header comment. SSG targets Jekyll-compatible sites; users needing LIQP semantics should set .withFlavor(Flavor.LIQP).

Multi-pass compression loop unimplemented (TODO at Compressor.scala:1021-1033). Single-pass only; TerserSuite compression tests disabled because the loop hangs. Effectively makes TerserJsCompressor a parse+re-emit, not a minifier.

SymbolDef/scope integration missing across compress passes (~50 TODOs in DropUnused, ReduceVars, Inference, Inline, TightenBody, Evaluate, GlobalDefs). Blocks safe inlining, DCE, constant folding, pure-call elision.
sourcemap.js (149 LOC) not ported. OutputStream lacks position tracking. Source map output impossible.
minify.js orchestration stubbed (93 LOC vs 413). Missing ecma normalization, mangle cache, format options, error shape, full pipeline sequencing.
Specialized compression passes missing: collapse-vars, negate-iife, wrap-iife, hoist_vars, drop_console, logical-assignment lowering.
Terser test/compress/*.js (168 fixtures, thousands of cases) not ingested. ssg-js has only 6 munit suites with ~no compression coverage. Fixtures use a simple DSL trivial to parse.
mozilla-ast.js (2099 LOC) SpiderMonkey AST format not ported. Public API surface gap; low priority.
— preserveLineBreaks now honored: collapseMultiSpaces and removeIntertagSpaces check the option — when true, newlines between tags are preserved as single newlines instead of being removed
— Quote-stripping regex changed from [A-Za-z0-9_-]+ to [^\s=<>"']+ matching htmlcompressor behavior — strips quotes from any value without whitespace/=/angle-brackets/quotes
— Added preserveSsi Boolean + SsiPattern regex to HtmlMinifyOptions for SSI directive preservation. effectivePreservePatterns auto-injects patterns from boolean flags.
CSS color folding (rgb()/rgba()->hex, named colors->hex), shorthand collapsing (margin/padding/font-weight), vendor-prefix culling not implemented.
— Minifier.minify now checks compressCss/compressJs/compressJson toggles — returns input unchanged when toggle is off. Added minifyFile method that also checks exclude patterns against file paths.
— Added preservePhp Boolean + PhpPattern regex to HtmlMinifyOptions. When true, <?php ... ?> blocks are auto-preserved during minification via effectivePreservePatterns.
compress_js_templates option missing. htmlcompressor option to also minify JavaScript template literals (backtick strings) inside <script> blocks. Port has no equivalent flag.

— Fixed insertBefore fallback: all 3 appendChild calls now use textBase.fold(node.insertBefore(newNode))(_.appendChild(newNode)) matching Java's null-check pattern — nodes are no longer silently dropped when textBase is empty

Enhanced CSS mode (cssminify2 v2.1.0+) entirely absent: css_enhanced_mode, css_merge_duplicate_selectors, css_optimize_shorthand_properties, css_advanced_color_optimization, css_preserve_ie_hacks, css_compress_variables. Port's CssMinifyOptions has none of these. Tracked separately from ISS-041 (which covers core gem feature gaps).

Replaces org.nibor.autolink (LinkExtractor) with hand-rolled regex (URL_PATTERN/EMAIL_PATTERN/adjustUrlEnd). Documented for cross-platform but introduces detection gaps vs nibor heuristics: trailing-punctuation rules, IDN/unicode TLDs, scheme allowlist, and surrounding-bracket trimming may diverge. Run flexmark-ext-autolink AstTest fixtures to quantify.

— Added JsCompressor.compress(input, options) overload with JsCompressorOptions trait. MinifyOptions gains jsCompressorOpts field. Minifier.minify passes options through when present. Concrete implementations (e.g. TerserOptions) can extend JsCompressorOptions.
— CSS removeComments now preserves /*! ... */ bang/important comments (license headers) while still removing regular /* ... */ block comments
— JsMinifier now preserves important comments: /*\! ... */ (bang comments) and /* @license ... */ are kept when removeComments=true, matching Terser's default behavior
— Protocol-removal regexes now match cite, longdesc, manifest, formaction, srcset in addition to href/src/action

— collapseMultiSpaces now uses \s{2,} (any whitespace) instead of ' {2,}' (spaces only) when preserveLineBreaks is false — matches htmlcompressor's remove_multi_spaces behavior that collapses all whitespace runs

Preserved-tag list is fixed at pre/textarea/script/style. htmlcompressor preserves additional content-sensitive tags depending on options (e.g. svg/math content in some configurations). Port has no configurable preserved-tag set; users must inject regexes via preservePatterns.

Cross-platform regex rewrite slightly more permissive than original Java pattern: '[a-z\d-]{0,37}[a-z\d]' allows consecutive dashes whereas '-(?=[a-z\d])' did not. Acceptable per documented note (matches actual GitHub rules), but flag for test verification.
— Ported getTocPrefix, getSimTocPrefix, markdownHeaderTexts, renderTocContent, renderMarkdownToc from flexmark TocUtils.java — all 5 missing markdown-side helpers now complete
— Added equals/hashCode, withRawTitleLevel, withRawTitle, withLevelList to TocOptions — matching Java original's full API surface

TreeTransformer is identical to TreeWalker — node.transform() method missing entirely. The class adds 'before/after' callback fields but neither does anything different from TreeWalker. Original transform.js (323 LOC, ~50 def_transform clauses) defines per-node-type transform() methods that walk children, then call the after callback to allow node replacement. Without this, any pass that depends on returning a replacement node from a TreeTransformer callback (e.g., GlobalDefs) silently does nothing. Port: AstNode.scala:203-206 vs original transform.js.

GlobalDefs.resolveDefs is dead code: (1) never called from Compressor.compress (no reference to GlobalDefs/resolveDefs anywhere in Compressor.scala) and (2) even if invoked, uses ast.walk(transformer) instead of ast.transform(transformer). The before-callback returns a replacement node, but TreeWalker discards return values used as substitution — only true/WalkAbort affect traversal. Result: global_defs compressor option is silently broken. Two fixes needed: wire resolveDefs into Compressor.compress, and either implement node.transform() or rewrite resolveDefs to mutate parent fields directly. See ISS-057. GlobalDefs.scala:216-260.
— getSymbolName now checks sym.thedef for SymbolDef with non-null mangledName, returning mangledName when available — matches original output.js print_name behavior (def.mangled_name || def.name)

Compressor.optimizeTree (single-pass walker, lines 200-340) only recurses into a small subset of node types: AstScope, AstBlock, AstSimpleStatement, AstIf, AstReturn, AstAssign, AstBinary, AstUnary, AstCall, AstConditional, AstSequence. Missing recursion into: AstFor, AstForIn, AstForOf, AstWhile, AstDo, AstSwitch, AstTry/Catch/Finally, AstClass body, AstFunction/Defun/Arrow body, AstObject/Array literal contents, AstThrow, AstWith, AstLabeledStatement, AstVarDef.value, AstExport.exportedValue, etc. As a result optimizations never fire on expressions inside loops, switches, classes, or function bodies. Compounds with ISS-031: even when single-pass works, coverage is partial. See Compressor.scala:200-340.

Compressor.dropConsole (line 1034-1037) is a literal no-op stub that returns toplevel unchanged. The dropConsole option is parsed and propagated through CompressorOptions but never actually drops console.* calls. Original index.js drop_console removes AST_Call nodes whose expression is a property access on a 'console' SymbolRef. Comment says 'TODO: implement console dropping via TreeTransformer' — also blocked by ISS-057 if reimplemented via TreeTransformer.

— isParagraphWrappingDisabled parameter type changed from Any to ListOptions across the entire hierarchy: ParagraphItemContainer trait, ListItem, TaskListItem, FootnoteBlock, DefinitionTerm, EnumeratedReferenceBlock. ListItem's pattern match removed in favor of direct listOptions.isInTightListItem(node) call.

— ListItem.openingMarker converted from var to protected _openingMarker + def getter/setter. TaskListItem overrides setter to throw IllegalStateException, matching Java's setOpeningMarker override. Constructor uses backing field directly.
— Replaced raw null with new MutableDataSet() in no-arg constructor — semantically equivalent (all DataKey.get calls return defaults) but avoids the no-null rule violation
— Fixed break-as-comment bug: wrapped while loop in boundary{} and replaced no-op 'lastFound // break' with break() for proper early exit on non-contiguous matches

— All 3 gaps fixed: (1) super-ctor now passes ATTRIBUTE_UNIQUIFICATION_CATEGORY_MAP, (2) renderReferenceText uses AttributesNodeFormatter.getEncodedIdAttribute for proper encoded id transformation, (3) Factory.afterDependents declares AttributesNodeFormatter.Factory dependency
— Fixed in ISS-066 resolution: renderReferenceBlock now uses markdown.appendNonTranslating(node.text) instead of append(node.text)

— Fixed behavioral bug: havePreviousOpener/haveNextCloser now return canOpen/canClose result on FIRST matching delimiter (matching Java behavior) instead of continuing search on false. Replaced return with boundary/break.
— Fixed as part of ISS-062: EnumeratedReferenceBlock.isParagraphWrappingDisabled uses ListOptions
— AsideBlock(chars, segments) constructor now sets contentLines = segments, matching Java's super(chars, segments) call

Java uses java.net.URL.getFile() (which returns rawPath+? +rawQuery if present, '' otherwise). Scala port emulates with URI getRawPath + (if query then '?'+query else ''). For typical youtu.be URLs results match. Edge case: URI parsing accepts more inputs than URL — some malformed strings that Java would catch as MalformedURLException now silently succeed via URI. Consider adding explicit scheme/host validation.
— MacroDefinitionBlock(chars, segments) constructor now sets contentLines = segments, matching Java's super(chars, segments) call

Placeholder ExtensionSuite only — tests construction and a single getType call. No spec-driven rendering tests for ordinal generation, cross-document references, compound types (a:b:c), or HTML output (anchor href, title via EnumRefTextCollectingVisitor). Original flexmark has Combo/Spec test suites with hundreds of fixtures; SSG has none. The renderer and formatter gaps would not surface without rendering tests.

Multiple uses of null.asInstanceOf[MacroDefinitionBlock] and Nullable.empty.getOrElse(null) to satisfy ReferencingNode trait return type. Trait should be re-typed to return Nullable[B] (out of group C scope but tracked here).
Placeholder ExtensionSuite only — tests prefixes and Utilities mime lookup. No end-to-end Markdown→HTML render tests for \![alt](url1|url2)A producing ,

Parser omits GitLab block-quote pass-through logic in tryContinue (Java lines 58-65). When close marker '<<<' is reached but the last child is an open GitLabBlockQuote, original lets the child handle the line; SSG always closes. Marked 'not yet ported' but should be tracked once GitLab ext is added.

Placeholder ExtensionSuite — tests node construction only. No tests for IMAGE_PATTERN matching ![alt](url =100x200) syntax or rendering to . Combo/Spec tests not ported. Cross-platform regex behavior (re2 vs Java) for the IMAGE_PATTERN is unverified.

Placeholder ExtensionSuite — only construction tests. No tests for @[text](https://youtu.be/ID) or @[text](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ID) post-processing or iframe rendering. The URL→URI substitution in the renderer (port-specific) is unverified, and the youtu.be vs youtube.com/watch branching has no fixtures.
— Fixed as part of ISS-062: ParagraphItemContainer now uses ListOptions, stale comment removed

astExtra prints typographic info only when defined (foreach), but Java original always prints ' typographic: <value> ' even when typographicText is null (printing 'null'). May affect AST snapshot tests.
— Fixed inverted comparison: addFirstReferenceOffset now uses > instead of <, keeping the smallest offset as intended. Bug exists in original Java too; fixed per CLAUDE.md fix-bugs policy.
astExtra getOrElse('') prints empty when typographicOpening/Closing is None; Java prints 'null'. Snapshot AST tests may diverge.
— Fixed translation semantics: node.info uses appendNonTranslating, node.title uses appendTranslating — matching original Java AdmonitionNodeFormatter

— Fixed break-as-comment bug in both link-resolver and content-resolver loops: wrapped each with boundary{}/break() so iteration stops on first non-UNKNOWN status, matching original Java break behavior
— Removed unnecessary child.isDefined guard on else branch — hasChildren guard ensures firstChild is always defined, matching Java's unconditional else
— Added DependencyResolver.resolveFlatDependencies for both LINK_RESOLVER_FACTORIES and CONTENT_RESOLVER_FACTORIES
— Replaced null with new MutableDataSet() in MacroDefinitionRepository default DataKey constructor, avoiding raw null at non-interop boundary
— Fixed blank-line handling: now checks isEmpty || firstChild.exists(_.next.isEmpty) matching Java's isEmpty || firstChild.getNext()==null condition
— Fixed missing break: propagate-loose-tight loop now uses boundary/break to exit on !blankLinesInAST, matching Java original
— Fixed as part of ISS-062: ParagraphItemContainer.isParagraphWrappingDisabled uses ListOptions instead of Any

alt-attribute string built as 'emoji ' + category + ':' + shortcut. Java passes possibly-null category/shortcut yielding literal 'null' substrings. Scala uses getOrElse("") yielding empty substrings. CAUTION comment in source notes string is consumed by Apple Mail HTML parser — different bytes may break round-trip.
— Documented Emoji→EmojiData inner class rename in migration notes. Breaking change needed to avoid name clash with outer Emoji node class.

— Fixed delegate resolution: DelegatingNodeRendererFactoryWrapper.nodeRenderers changed to private[html], HtmlRenderer now creates wrappers with Nullable.empty then sets the complete list on all wrappers before DependencyResolver.resolveFlatDependencies — beforeDependents now correctly resolves delegate ordering

— Fixed early-exit bug: wrapped preProcessParagraph body in boundary{} and replaced 'continue = false // return' with break(()) at both unlink points — inner for loop now exits immediately when block is removed, matching Java's return behavior
— getReferenceNode(Document) now delegates to getReferenceNode(Parser.REFERENCES.get(document)) as in the Java original — Parser.REFERENCES was already ported
— anchorRefText now reads HEADER_ID_REF_TEXT_TRIM_LEADING_SPACES/TRAILING_SPACES from document options instead of hardcoding true

— Fixed collectedNodes population: changed from val to var, added collectNodeTypes HashSet to accumulate nodeClasses during formatter loop, and added post-loop NodeCollectingVisitor.collect() + getSubClassingBag() to populate collectedNodes — nodesOfType()/reversedNodesOfType() now work correctly
Drops IDN.toASCII punicode handling and trailing-slash preservation from Java convertUnicodeURLToAscii; also bypasses Relative_Url inheritance. Unicode domain URLs will fail.
— Relative_Url ported: URI normalization, query/anchor split, toASCIIString, Inspectable support, addError/STRICT mode. Absolute_Url now extends Relative_Url with convertUnicodeURLToAscii.
— Split filter now strips leading empty string when input begins with delimiter, matching Java's lookbehind behavior without re2-incompatible regex.
— matchCondition now uses singletonMap (no parent var copying) + renderToObjectUnguarded with parent context + strict 'true'.equals check — matching Java original's exact semantics
— IncludeRelative.detectSource now resolves paths relative to context.getRootFolder(), falling back to cwd. Include.scala refactored with detectSource hook.

optimizeBinary missing ~15 optimization paths: 32-bit equality, bitwise De Morgan, associative folding, template concat, boolean-context +, comparisons negation, unsafe_comps reversal, right-assoc flattening, a+-b to a-b

optimizeCall missing ~13 optimization paths: unused arg trimming, console.assert folding, Array.from/Array(n), String()/Number() 0-arg, Symbol trimming, RegExp ctor, method call opts (.toString/.join/.charAt/.apply/.call), unsafe_Function, inline_array_like_spread on args

optimizeConditional missing ~12 optimization paths: condition negation swap, x?x:y to x||y, common-assign merge, single-arg-diff call merge, nested ternary flattening, nullish coalescing a==null?b:a to a??b, sequence/binary dedup patterns
optimizeIf missing 4 paths: negated condition preference (negated_is_best), empty-body-alt to || expr, aborts(body) hoist-alt, aborts(alternative) swap-hoist. Port covers ~67pct of original branches
optimizeUnaryPrefix missing 3 paths: negate binary in boolean context (best_of with negate), tilde-xor distributivity (~(x^y) => x^~y), is_32_bit_integer check for double-tilde

maintain_this_binding never called in port: original uses it in AST_Conditional, AST_Binary (&&/||), AST_Sequence to preserve this-context during expression rewriting. May produce incorrect code for method references
optimizeSub missing arguments[n] to named-param optimization and array-literal index flattening ([a,b,c][1] => side-effects + b)
optimizeDot missing unsafe_proto optimization (Array.prototype.foo => [].foo etc) and PropAccess-within-PropAccess early return guard
optimizeAssign missing dead_code elimination (assignment to unreachable var in exit context) and lift_sequences call
optimizeObjectKeyVal missing unsafe_methods: p:function(){} to p(){} and p:()=>{} to p(){} concise method conversion
optimizeChain incomplete: original replaces entirely-nullish chain with void 0 (or 0 for delete context). Port only unwraps optional flag when receiver is non-nullish

optimizeDo truthy-condition path: original wraps body+condition in for-block to preserve condition side effects as trailing statement. Port creates bare AstFor without condition side-effect preservation
CRITICAL: scope.walk(tt) instead of scope.transform(tt) at line ~336. Transformer output discarded, making drop-unused a no-op. Original: self.transform(tt) at drop-unused.js:464.
resolveFixedValue uses Java reflection (getClass.getMethod/invoke) at lines 292-310. Breaks on JS/Native, calls wrong receiver (thedef not SymbolRef). Replace with AstSymbolRef.fixedValue().
find_variable, is_atomic, unsafe_undefined_ref helpers missing. optimizeInfinity/NaN/Undefined replace globals even when locally shadowed (var Infinity=5). Port from index.js:655-665,2963-2982.
optimizeBlockStatement has inverted hasDirective("use strict") check at line ~760. \!hasDirective(...).isInstanceOf[AstNode] is backwards. Should be hasDirective("use strict") == null.

collapse_vars pass (~693 LOC) entirely missing. tighten-body.js:278-970 contains collapse() with 19 sub-functions (scanner, multi_replacer, extract_candidates, find_stop, etc). Most impactful single optimization in the compressor.

negate() entirely missing (~80 LOC). inference.js:836-917. Dispatches per-type: UnaryPrefix unwrap, Sequence negate-last, Conditional negate-both, Binary flip-operator/DeMorgan. Used by optimizeIf, optimizeConditional, optimizeUnaryPrefix.
bitwise_negate() entirely missing (~35 LOC). inference.js:919-954. Folds ~~x, constant-folds ~N. Used by optimizeBinary De Morgan paths.

is_callee_pure + global_pure_fns entirely missing (~30 LOC). inference.js:956-987. Blocks dead-call elimination — has_side_effects(AstCall) and may_throw(AstCall) are stubbed always-true because this is absent.
is_call_pure entirely missing (~20 LOC). inference.js:990-1010. Determines if a method call on a native object (Array/String/Number/etc) is pure. Needed by has_side_effects and drop-side-effect-free.

is_constant_expression + all_refs_local entirely missing (~75 LOC). inference.js:671-745. Walks AST checking for out-of-scope references. Used by reduce_vars for inlining decisions and by inline.js. Evaluate.scala has a misplaced incomplete stub.

contains_this entirely missing (~12 LOC). inference.js:1045-1056. Walks tree for AST_This, stops at non-Arrow scopes. Required by is_modified and inline.js. NOTE: Compressor.scala has a private containsThis() but Inference.scala (the canonical location) does not.

handle_defined_after_hoist (~140 LOC) entirely missing. reduce-vars.js:518-660. Two-pass analysis detecting when hoisted fn uses var written after call site. Never called from markLambda or Toplevel handler. Without it, reduce_vars may incorrectly inline variables.

inlineIntoCall missing body-flattening path (~200 LOC). inline.js:490-674 — can_flatten_body, can_inject_args, can_inject_vars, can_inject_symbols, append_var, flatten_args, flatten_vars, flatten_fn. Also missing: reduce_vars symbol resolution, dont_inline_lambda_in_loop guard, negate_iife.

inlineIntoSymbolRef missing 15+ paths. inline.js:168-320 — missing: in_computed_key guard, is_const_symbol_short_than_init_value, is_callee_pure/_NOINLINE on single_use, cross-scope class return, retain_top_func/escaped/INLINED block, DefClass→ClassExpression, Defun→Function, recursive-ref rewriting, clone-to-scope, AST_This multi-use, evaluate+unsafe_regexp, size-based overhead calc.

hoist_declarations (~134 LOC) and hoist_properties (~67 LOC) entirely missing. index.js:739-941. before() has comment "deferred ISS-035". Hoists var decls to function top, merges obj.a/obj.b to individual vars.

bestOf(compressor,ast1,ast2) missing. common.js:186-192. Dispatches to bestOfStatement or bestOfExpression based on firstInStatement. Also: isRefOf always returns false (TODO stub at line 420), isReachable uses wrong algorithm (walk instead of walk_parent, async/generator guard dropped).

has_side_effects(AstCall) always returns true (stub at line ~343). may_throw(AstCall) always returns true (stub at line ~511). Both need is_callee_pure (ISS-122). Also missing: AstAssign use-strict+SymbolRef guard in may_throw, aborts() missing AstSwitchBranch/AstDefClass/AstClassStaticBlock/AstIf cases, _dot_throw missing AstObject/AstExpansion/AstDot cases.

evalSymbolRef is complete stub (always returns self, line ~468). No fixed_value lookup, no escaped depth check, reentrantRefEval set declared but never mutated. Also missing: AST_Function unsafe fn-object creation, RegExp/global_objs eval paths, BigInt guard in evalBinary, NaN+AST_With guard.

dropCall is_callee_pure/is_call_pure stubbed (TODO at line ~259). dropClass missing is_self_referential check. dropAssign missing use-strict+PropAccess guard. dropUnary missing IIFE-in-statement negate branch. AstClassPrivateProperty missing computed key branch.

Major gaps beyond the walk/transform bug: drop_funcs/drop_vars as distinct flags missing, assign_as_unused never called, uses_arguments→argname mark missing, in_export parent check missing, var_defs_by_id tracking missing, AST_Definitions processing in pass 1 missing, lambda argname trimming missing, scan_ref_scoped missing.

Beyond collapse_vars: handleIfReturn has 7/8 patterns missing (can_merge_flow, next_index, prev_index, has_multiple_if_returns, extract_defuns all absent). sequencesize_2 entirely missing. joinConsecutiveVars only handles var+var (8 other join patterns missing). eliminateDeadCode loopcontrol_target stubbed.

figure_out_scope call is TODO stub at line ~219. deepClone is a stub ("for now return node itself"). AstChain case in findDefs drops suffix (bug). SymbolRef global check uses fragile reflection on undeclared field instead of global().

markEscaped missing AstYield escape condition and AstUsingDef in VarDefLike check. reduceSymbolRef \!d.fixed check uses == false instead of falsy (misses null/undefined). reset_def sets singleUse=false instead of undefined/null sentinel.

Missing options: ie8, pure_new, warnings. sequences_limit computation incomplete (get("sequences") returns only boolean, never int count; special case 1→800 absent). CompressorLike missing: in_computed_key(), mangle_options(), sequences_limit field.

optimizeBinary dropped branches: precedence guard on lhs_constants swap, is_strict_comparison flag gating void→null, mask-bits De Morgan check, template+template concat, unsafe_math gate on * associativity, bitwise De Morgan (z&(X|y)), two-level constant fold, x||false&&y conditional, parent-is-&&-with-left check.

optimizeCall dropped branches: inline_array_like_spread on args, AST_Expansion in unused-args loop, Array.from optimization, Symbol case, RegExp case, unsafe_Function block, inliner ordering (called before builtins, should be after).

optimizeConditional dropped branches: negate-if-shorter, call-arg-diff merge (single_arg_diff), a?b:(c,b)→(a||c),b, full truthy/falsy constant handling beyond AstTrue/AstFalse literals. optimizeSub: OPT_ARGUMENTS block, array element extraction, key normalization all missing.

optimizeUnaryPrefix: unsafe_undefined_ref for void 0, \!Binary→negate in bool context, ~~x is-32-bit alternative, ~(x^y) transform. optimizeDot: unsafe_proto block, _NOINLINE guard, PropAccess chain short-circuit. optimizeNew: only Object handled, misses RegExp/Function/Error/Array→Call conversion.

Remaining handler gaps: optimizeSequence missing first_in_statement/trim_right_for_undefined/maintain_this_binding. optimizeTemplateString missing PrefixedTemplateString guard, length check, template-in-template flatten, 3-segment folds. optimizeFunction missing uses_arguments guard. optimizeDo loses condition side-effect. optimizeSwitch default-body splicing incomplete. isNullishCheck missing ===null||===undefined compound form. optimizeObjectKeyVal missing unsafe_methods→ConciseMethod. optimizeDestructuring export check misses Const/Let.

Port at lines 1145-1167 only handles rr==Some(false), missing the truthy-constant case with parent-is-&&-with-left check.

optimizeBinary || case missing falsy-rr branch with parent check. optimizeBinary missing set_flag TRUTHY/FALSY fallbacks. Declaration value wiring to _rdExpression causes infinite loop. Root cause: _rdExpression with until callback still hangs on some inputs. Stall detectors (position-based, recursion depth, total iteration count) do not fire — the loop advances the scanner each iteration. Likely the scanner runs past the entire file without hitting a stop condition. Needs: single-test reproduction to identify the exact input, then fix the stop condition or the expression form that eats past boundaries.

selectorPseudoIsSuperselector :is/:matches/:where path uses approximate complexIsSuperselectorComponents instead of full ExtendFunctions.complexIsSuperselector: Dart functions.dart:988-994 calls the real complexIsSuperselector(complex1.components, [...?parents, ComplexSelectorComponent(compound2, const [], compound2.span)]). Scala CompoundSelector.scala:224-231 calls a private complexIsSuperselectorComponents (lines 324-350) that is a simplified greedy-match algorithm ignoring combinators entirely. This means :is() superselector checks involving child/sibling combinators (e.g. ':is(.a > .b)' vs '.a > .b .c') may produce incorrect results. Fix: replace complexIsSuperselectorComponents call with ExtendFunctions.complexIsSuperselector(complex1.components, target).

unifyComplex docstring says 'skipping the trailing-combinator merging matrix': The docstring on Scala lines 86-87 says this is a 'pragmatic port' that skips trailing-combinator merging. However, the actual implementation on lines 116-123 DOES handle trailing combinators (single-combinator merge and multi-combinator rejection). The docstring is stale and misleading. Fix: update the docstring to remove the 'pragmatic port' / 'skipping' language since the implementation handles trailing combinators faithfully.

[was ISS-002] Compound unit algebra gaps in SassNumber: dart-sass lib/src/value/number.dart + number/{complex,single_unit,unitless}.dart implements three specialized subclasses (UnitlessSassNumber, SingleUnitSassNumber, ComplexSassNumber) with full numerator/denominator normalization, cross-type coercion (length*time, freq/angle), and conversion-factor caching. ssg-sass uses a single flat SassNumber with best-effort unit handling. Needs: multi-unit product/quotient canonicalization, compatible-unit detection across complex numerators, and coerceValueToUnit fallback paths. REOPEN: marked resolved by automated scan but underlying code uses stubs/simplifications. Requires full faithful port.

[was ISS-003] fuzzyEquals / fuzzyHashCode: dart-sass lib/src/util/number.dart defines an epsilon-aware comparison (fuzzyEquals, fuzzyLessThan, fuzzyRound, fuzzyAsInt, fuzzyCheckRange) used throughout number arithmetic and the extend matcher. ssg-sass appears to compare doubles directly in several paths, causing false inequality near 1e-11 rounding errors. [was ISS-102] async/sync evaluator split: dart-sass ships both async_evaluate.dart and evaluate.dart generated from a single source via tool/grind/synchronize.dart. ssg-sass is sync-only, which is correct but means the async-importer JS API is unsupported.

CloneCssVisitor is a complete stub: every visit method returns the input node unchanged. Dart original (109 LOC) creates deep ModifiableCss copies with new selector mappings from ExtensionStore.clone(). Missing: _visitChildren helper, cloneCssStylesheet() top-level function.

EveryCssVisitor defaults all methods to true but Dart defaults leaf methods (Comment/Declaration/Import) to false and parent methods recurse via node.children.every(). Scala inverts semantics AND drops all child recursion. Every-CSS predicate checks will always return true regardless of content.

rgb()/rgba() 2-arg path missing Dart _rgbTwoArg logic (lines 1388-1423): no isSpecialVariable checks, no isLegacy check/throw for non-legacy colors, no assertLegacy call, no toSpace(rgb) conversion, no isSpecialNumber handling to construct 4-arg function string. Port lines 533-541 just does scalar extraction and changeAlpha.

ExpressionToCalcVisitor is a complete stub (all identity returns). Dart original (65 LOC) wraps modulo in max(math), converts unary +/- for calc, passes InterpolatedFunction/If unchanged. Also missing: top-level expressionToCalc() function wrapping result in FunctionExpression('calc'). Used by error messages and calculation simplifier.

IsCalculationSafeVisitor is a complete stub (all return false). Dart original (90 LOC) returns true for: FunctionExpression, IfExpression, InterpolatedFunctionExpression, LegacyIfExpression, NumberExpression, VariableExpression; validates BinaryOperationExpression for +/-/*/div with recursive left/right check; validates ListExpression (space-sep, no brackets, >1 items); validates StringExpression (not !important, not #id, not U+range, not url()). Critical for calculation evaluation - without it, calc() arguments are never recognized as safe.

rgb()/rgba() 3-4 arg paths use custom scalar() helper instead of Dart _colorFromChannels (line 1370-1384). Dart routes through _colorFromChannels which uses _channelFromValue for unit validation and clamping. Port uses scalar() which only handles % and unitless, missing _channelFromValue behaviors: requiresPercent check, lowerClamped/upperClamped split clamping, proper percentageOrUnitless error messages. Also missing fromRgbFunction=true flag for ColorFormat tracking.
SassParser uses indented-to-SCSS preprocessing instead of faithful port. Original has 19 methods; port replaces ALL with UnsupportedOperationException stubs.

CssParser uses post-parse AST-walk instead of dart-sass inline parse-time rejection. Missing: _disallowedFunctionNames set, _cssFunctionRule, _cssImportRule, parentheses override, identifierLike override.

hsl()/hsla() 3-4 arg paths use raw args(N).assertNumber().value instead of Dart _colorFromChannels (lines 1427-1450). Dart routes through _colorFromChannels which calls _checkPercent on saturation/lightness (emitting deprecation warning for non-% units), _angleValue on hue (with deprecation for non-angle units), and _percentageOrUnitless for proper unit validation. Port lines 569-579 skip all of this.

IsPlainCssVisitor is a complete stub (all return false). Dart original (98 LOC) has _allowInterpolation field, returns true for: ColorExpression, NumberExpression; validates FunctionExpression (no namespace + valid args), ListExpression (non-empty or bracketed), ParenthesizedExpression, StringExpression (plain or interpolation-allowed); validates IfExpression branches; implements IfConditionExpressionVisitor (6 methods). Also missing: _visitArgumentList helper. Used by Expression.isPlainCss which gates Sass-vs-CSS classification.

Parser.scala missing 10 methods from parser.dart: matchesIdentifier, scanCharIf, scanIdentChar, expectIdentChar, tryUrl, withErrorMessage, debug, _adjustExceptionSpan, _firstNewlineBefore, spanFromPosition. Also scanIdentifier uses char-by-char loop instead of scanIdentChar.
Value.sassIndexToListIndex missing deprecation warning for unitful indexes

ReplaceExpressionVisitor is a complete stub (all identity returns). Dart original (193 LOC) creates deep copies: BinaryOperationExpression(op, left.accept, right.accept), FunctionExpression(originalName, visitArgumentList), ListExpression with mapped contents, MapExpression with mapped pairs, StringExpression(visitInterpolation), SupportsExpression(visitSupportsCondition), UnaryOperationExpression(op, operand.accept). Also missing: visitArgumentList, visitSupportsCondition, visitInterpolation protected helpers AND all 6 IfConditionExpressionVisitor methods. ExpressionToCalcVisitor depends on this as its base class.

StylesheetParser.scala missing 25+ methods from stylesheet.dart: almostAnyValue, _interpolatedDeclarationValue, _mediaQueryList, interpolatedStringToken, _tryUrlContents, _withChildren, _lookingAtPotentialPropertyHack, _addOrInject, _publicIdentifier, _assertPublic, mozDocumentRule, unknownAtRule, _disallowedAtRule, _functionChild, _declarationAtRule, _plainAtRuleName, _importSupportsQuery, _tryImportSupportsFunction, _supportsCondition, _supportsConditionInParens, _supportsDeclarationValue, _urlString, _memberList, parseParameterList (return type wrong), expressionUntilComma (partially).

Global alpha() function missing Microsoft filter multi-arg overload. Dart has overloadedFunction with two signatures: single-arg  (with Microsoft filter detection) and ... (with multi-arg Microsoft filter check and proper error for >1 non-filter args). Port line 826-834 only handles single-arg via pattern match, missing the ... overload entirely. Also missing the SassColor(isLegacy: false) branch that throws 'alpha() is only supported for legacy colors'.

Value._selectorString and _selectorStringOrNull not ported (Dart value.dart:248-293). Also missing SassApiValue extension methods assertSelector, assertSimpleSelector, assertCompoundSelector, assertComplexSelector (Dart value.dart:447-551). Used by selector-parse(), selector-nest(), etc.

Value.plus missing SassCalculation throw (Dart value.dart:367-369 throws Undefined operation for SassCalculation). Value.minus also missing SassCalculation check (Dart lines 376-381). Port silently concatenates instead.

RecursiveAstVisitor is a complete stub: all 50+ methods are no-ops (return Unit). Dart original (377 LOC) has full recursive traversal: visitAtRootRule visits query+super, visitAtRule visits name+value interpolations+super, visitContentRule visits ArgumentList, visitDebugRule/ErrorRule/WarnRule visit expression, visitDeclaration visits name interpolation+value expression+super, visitEachRule visits list+super, visitForRule visits from+to+super, visitIfRule visits clause expressions+children, visitImportRule visits StaticImport url/modifiers interpolations, visitIncludeRule visits ArgumentList+super, all 18 expression visitors recurse into sub-expressions, all 6 IfCondition visitors recurse, all 11 InterpolatedSelector visitors recurse, plus visitCallableDeclaration, visitArgumentList, visitSupportsCondition, visitInterpolation, visitQualifiedName protected helpers. Without this, any visitor extending RecursiveAstVisitor (like FindDependenciesVisitor's conceptual base) will silently skip expression traversal.

Expression parser uses text-based _parseSimpleExpression instead of dart-sass recursive-descent _singleExpression. The original has a proper operator-precedence parser with 30+ dispatch cases in _singleExpression. The port collects raw text then does regex-like splitting. _rdExpression is partially ported but labeled stage 1 with many stubs.

Value.toCssString uses toString as fallback instead of calling serializeValue(this, quote: quote). toString also does not call serializeValue(this, inspect: true). Both delegate to subclass toString which may diverge from dart-sass serializer behavior.
parseSignature throws UnsupportedOperationException. parseVariableDeclaration and parseUseRule lack proper error handling. parseParameterList not ported (returns wrong type).

to-gamut() implementation differs critically from Dart: (1) Dart requires non-null method arg and throws specific error message 'color.to-gamut() requires a method argument for forwards-compatibility' when method is null (lines 666-673). Port silently defaults to localMinde. (2) Dart validates method name via GamutMapMethod.fromName BEFORE checking space.isBounded, so invalid method names always produce errors. Port doesn't validate. (3) Dart returns color unchanged if space is not bounded (line 681). Port doesn't check isBounded.
ImportCache missing 11 methods from import_cache.dart

MediaQueryParser uses custom text-based scanner (pos/text) instead of inheriting from Parser and using scanner. Missing: _mediaLogicSequence, does not handle or-conjoined conditions (Media Level 4 or keyword), does not handle (not ...) parenthesized conditions properly.

Value.assertInt exists in port (line 107-108) but does not exist in original Dart value.dart. The original assertInt is only on SassNumber. This is invented logic that may mask bugs by throwing generic error instead of assertNumber first.

SourceInterpolationVisitor is a complete stub (all return Nullable.empty). Dart original (186 LOC) builds an InterpolationBuffer from source spans: visitStringExpression adds interpolation elements, visitListExpression/visitIfExpression write between-element text, visitInterpolatedFunctionExpression adds name interpolation + arguments, visitColorExpression/visitNumberExpression write span text. Also missing: _visitArguments and _writeListAndBetween private helpers, IfConditionExpressionVisitor implementation (6 methods). Used by Expression.asInterpolation for source-faithful calc() messaging.

KeyframeSelectorParser uses custom text-based scanner instead of inheriting from Parser. Missing: scientific notation (e/E exponent), plus-sign prefix support. Also incorrectly normalizes from->0% and to->100% — dart-sass preserves from/to keywords as-is.

SassFunction missing _compileContext field and assertCompileContext method. Dart function.dart:31-56 has _compileContext + withCompileContext constructor + assertCompileContext that prevents cross-compilation function execution. Port has no equivalent.

SassMixin missing _compileContext field and assertCompileContext method. Dart mixin.dart:30-56 has _compileContext + withCompileContext constructor + assertCompileContext that prevents cross-compilation mixin execution. Port has no equivalent.

AtRootQueryParser uses custom text-based scanner instead of inheriting from Parser. Missing: wrapSpanFormatException error wrapping, does not call scanner.expectDone(). Functionally equivalent but bypasses shared Parser infrastructure.

color.same() implementation does not match Dart same-space optimization: Dart lines 744-751 first checks if both colors are in the same space and if so compares channels directly (channel0/1/2/alpha) without converting to xyz-d65. Only converts to xyz-d65 when spaces differ. Additionally, Dart converts missing channels to 0 via toXyzNoMissing local function. Port lines 1762-1778 always converts both to xyz-d65, missing the same-space shortcut and missing-channel handling.

All three search visitors (StatementSearchVisitor, SelectorSearchVisitor, AstSearchVisitor) are complete stubs returning Nullable.empty for every method. Dart originals: StatementSearchVisitor (100 LOC) recurses into children via .search(), visiting if-clauses, content blocks, and callable declarations. SelectorSearchVisitor (38 LOC) recurses through complex->compound->simple selectors. AstSearchVisitor (269 LOC) extends StatementSearchVisitor with full expression/interpolation/selector traversal using 70+ methods with null-short-circuit search. These are used by the evaluator for first-match AST queries. Without recursion, any search-based visitor will never find anything.

StylesheetGraph skeletal reimplementation missing 20 methods from stylesheet_graph.dart: modifiedSince, _add, addCanonical (recanonicalize), _upstreamNodes, reload, reloadAllModified, remove, _recanonicalizeImports, _recanonicalizeImportsForNode, _nodeFor, _ignoreErrors. StylesheetNode missing upstream/upstreamImports as Maps, _replaceUpstream, _remove. Port 98 LOC vs 520 original (19%)

SelectorParser uses custom text-based scanner (pos/src) instead of inheriting from Parser and using scanner. Missing: _aNPlusB method (nth-child/nth-last-child An+B parsing delegated to raw text), no proper _pseudoSelector that parses nth-child of-selector. parseSimpleSelector and parseCompoundSelector are public but dart-sass has them private.

Configuration missing ExplicitConfiguration subclass, _originalConfiguration/sameOriginal tracking, throughForward (forward show/hide/prefix filtering via UnprefixedMapView+LimitedMapView), _withValues. Port Configuration.remove returns Nullable not ConfiguredValue?. Immutable values Map vs mutable backing. 79 LOC vs 138 original (57%)

ScssParser.scala missing: _silentComment (statement-level), _loudComment (statement-level with interpolation support), _whitespace helper, _whitespaceWithoutComments helper. The children/statements methods lack proper / dispatch that dart-sass has (lines 63-127). scanElse does not handle @elseif deprecation warning.

SassString.plus uses wrong quoting logic: Dart string.dart:222-224 preserves THIS strings hasQuotes (SassString(text + other.text, quotes: hasQuotes)). Port line 91 uses hasQuotes || s.hasQuotes, which incorrectly quotes the result when OTHER is quoted but this is not. This changes Sass string concatenation semantics.

InterpolationMap is skeleton — mapSpan throws UnsupportedOperationException. Missing 7 methods: mapException, mapSpan impl, _isMapped, _mapLocation, _indexInContents, _expandInterpolationSpanLeft, _expandInterpolationSpanRight. Port 41 LOC vs 222 original (18%)

color.channel() implementation differs from Dart: (1) Dart line 2050-2051 validates channel name via _channelName which calls assertString('channel').assertQuoted('channel'), ensuring the argument is a QUOTED string. Port line 1649 uses strArg() which accepts both quoted and unquoted. (2) Dart line 690-691 uses _colorInSpace which respects legacyMissing parameter. Port line 1651 uses optSpace/toSpace without legacyMissing. (3) Dart line 708 scales conventionally-percent channels: channelValue * 100 / max. Port line 1663 delegates to channelNumber() but the scaling logic may differ.

SerializeVisitor missing ValueVisitor and SelectorVisitor implementations. Dart original implements CssVisitor<void>, ValueVisitor<void>, AND SelectorVisitor<void>. Scala port only implements CssVisitor[Unit]. Missing visitor methods: visitBoolean, visitCalculation (with _writeCalculationValue, _writeCalculationUnits, _parenthesizeCalculationRhs), visitColor (delegated to formatColorDispatch but not via visitor pattern), visitFunction, visitMixin, visitList (delegated to formatList but not via visitor), visitMap, visitNull, visitNumber, visitString. Also missing all 11 SelectorVisitor methods: visitAttributeSelector, visitClassSelector, visitComplexSelector, visitCompoundSelector, visitIDSelector, visitSelectorList, visitParentSelector, visitPlaceholderSelector, visitPseudoSelector, visitTypeSelector, visitUniversalSelector. This means Value.accept(serializer) and Selector.accept(serializer) cannot work - only the internal formatValue/formatSelectorList helpers are used.

StylesheetParser missing state tracking fields from dart-sass: _isUseAllowed, _inMixin, _inContentBlock, _inControlDirective, _inUnknownAtRule, _inPlainCssFunction, _inStyleRule, _globalVariables, lastSilentComment. These control context-sensitive parsing rules like disallowing @use after other statements, rejecting @extend outside style rules, tracking mixin nesting depth, etc.

SassString.isSpecialNumber uses toLowerCase().startsWith() which is correct functionally but does not match dart-sass char-by-char case-insensitive comparison (Dart string.dart:69-105). Port also includes if() in isSpecialNumber (line 42: lower.startsWith("if(")) which the original does NOT include -- if() is listed only in isSpecialVariable NOT isSpecialNumber.

Compile missing compile(path) body, compileString missing 14 parameters (importers/loadPaths/importer/quietDeps/verbose/charset/silenceDeprecations/fatalDeprecations/futureDeprecations etc), _compileStylesheet helper with source map URL rewriting, DeprecationProcessingLogger integration. 85 LOC vs 238 original (36%)

SassString.isSpecialVariable includes env() but original Dart string.dart:109-125 does NOT include env() in isSpecialVariable. Dart only checks attr(), if(), and var(). Port line 49 adds env() which is incorrect.

EvaluationContext warn takes Boolean deprecation instead of Nullable[Deprecation], missing warnForDeprecationFromApi, currentCallableSpan getter. Extra CurrentEnvironment/CurrentCallableInvoker/CurrentMixinInvoker are SSG additions

color.is-missing() missing channel name validation: Dart line 648-651 uses _channelName(arguments[1]) which calls assertString('channel').assertQuoted('channel') to ensure the argument is a quoted string and passes colorName='color'/channelName='channel' to isChannelMissing. Port line 1719 uses strArg() which accepts unquoted strings and does not pass colorName/channelName to isChannelMissing.

EvaluateVisitor missing Evaluator class: Dart has a public final class Evaluator wrapping _EvaluateVisitor with use(), evaluate(), setVariable() entry points for incremental evaluation. This class is not ported.

StylesheetParser._declarationOrStyleRule is a simplified heuristic that uses peek-and-backtrack instead of dart-sass's proper _declarationOrBuffer/disambiguate algorithm. Missing: _variableDeclarationOrInterpolation, _lookingAtPotentialPropertyHack handling, proper custom property detection, _tryDeclarationChildren for nested namespace properties, couldBeSelector backtrack logic.

Callable missing AsyncCallable interface, Callable.fromSignature factory, BuiltInCallable.callbackFor overload resolution (original stores List of (ParameterList,Callback) pairs), warnForGlobalBuiltIn. AliasedCallable is SSG invention not in original
Deprecation missing calcInterp enum value (deprecated legacy) and duplicateVariableFlags static alias
Utils missing bulletedList, consumeEscapedCharacter, parseSignature, throwWithTrace/attachTrace/getTrace, copyMapOfMap, copyMapOfList. 318 LOC vs 495 original (64%)

SassString.assertQuoted error message differs: Dart says "Expected $this to be a quoted string." Port says "Expected $this to be quoted." Missing "a" and "string". Similarly assertUnquoted: Dart "Expected $this to be an unquoted string." Port "Expected $this to be unquoted."

Parser.whitespaceWithoutComments unconditionally treats consumeNewlines=false as space-or-tab only. In dart-sass, the base class always eats all whitespace (including newlines); only SassParser overrides to be newline-aware. The Scala base class should consume all whitespace, and only SassParser should restrict based on consumeNewlines.
Module trait missing upstream, variableNodes, preModuleComments fields and cloneCss interface method from original module.dart

color.is-powerless() missing channel name validation and colorName/channelName args: Dart line 757-763 uses _channelName for validation and passes colorName='color'/channelName='channel'. Port line 1707 uses strArg() and calls isChannelPowerless without these named args.

EvaluateVisitor missing meta built-in functions: Dart constructor registers 10 meta functions (global-variable-exists, variable-exists, function-exists, mixin-exists, content-exists, module-variables, module-functions, module-mixins, get-function, get-mixin) and 2 meta mixins (load-css, apply) that need access to the evaluator environment. These 210+ LOC of meta-function implementations are not ported in the Scala EvaluateVisitor constructor. Instead they appear to be handled elsewhere, but verify they have full parity with the dart-sass implementations including compile-context validation.
Logger.default hardcodes color=false instead of checking terminal color support dynamically like DefaultLogger in logger/default.dart

SassList constructor missing ArgumentError for undecided separator with >1 element: Dart list.dart:55-59 throws ArgumentError if separator is undecided and asList.length > 1. Port SassList constructor (lines 24-28) has no such validation.
SassException.toCssString uses manual escapeForCssContent instead of SassString-based Unicode escape; MultiSpanSassException.toString lacks highlightMultiple with primary/secondaryColor

Parser.wrapSpanFormatException only catches StringScannerException. The dart-sass version has 3 catch blocks: SourceSpanFormatException with interpolationMap remapping, MultiSourceSpanFormatException -> MultiSpanSassFormatException, and plain SourceSpanFormatException -> SassFormatException. Missing error span adjustment via _adjustExceptionSpan/_firstNewlineBefore.

EvaluateVisitor missing _combineCss: Dart _combineCss (lines 1024-1082) combines CSS from all modules into a single stylesheet with import ordering, pre-module comments, and extension application. Also missing _extendModules (lines 1083-1148) and _indexAfterImports (lines 1149-1165). These are critical for multi-module compilation producing correct CSS output ordering.

SassList.toString does not match Dart: Dart list.dart:64-72 wraps in parentheses when not-bracketed and length > 0 and not (length==1 with comma separator), falling back to super.toString() for the others (which calls serializeValue with inspect:true). Port line 96 just delegates to toCssString() with no inspect-mode wrapping.
Expression.sourceInterpolation property not ported from dart-sass expression.dart:38-43

Module-scope color functions missing _removedColorFunction entries: Dart module (lines 488-549) registers _removedColorFunction for adjust-hue, lighten, darken, saturate, desaturate, opacify, fade-in, transparentize, fade-out. These throw errors saying 'function X() isn't in the sass:color module' with a recommendation. Port's module list (lines 1891-1919) does not include these error-throwing stubs, so calling e.g. color.lighten() in module scope may silently resolve to the global version instead of throwing.
Expression.isPlainCss method not ported from dart-sass expression.dart:55-59. Uses IsPlainCssVisitor to check if expression is valid plain CSS.

SassNumber.plus/minus missing SassColor check: Dart number.dart:763-769 plus checks "if other is! SassColor" before calling super.plus, and throws "Undefined operation" for SassColor. Port lines 408-414 comment says "SassColor check would go here" but does not implement it. Same for minus (Dart 773-779 vs port 416-421).

EvaluateVisitor missing _loadModule/_execute/_loadStylesheet: Dart _loadModule (lines 802-879) handles built-in module detection, cycle detection via _activeModules, and delegates to _execute. _execute (lines 889-1000) saves/restores ALL evaluator state (17 fields), runs the stylesheet in a fresh environment, and creates a Module. _loadStylesheet resolves URLs via importers. These are required for correct @use/@forward behavior beyond the simplified importer-based approach currently used.
Expression.parse factory not ported from dart-sass expression.dart:50-51. Delegates to ScssParser.parseExpression.

SassNumber.sassIndexToListIndex missing deprecation warning (inherited from Value port). Dart value.dart:128-139 warns for Deprecation.functionUnits when index has units. Port Value.scala:58-68 has no hasUnits check or deprecation call.
StringExpression.asInterpolation method not ported from dart-sass string.dart:61-80. Converts quoted string back to interpolation including quote characters. Used by toString and serialization.

Module-scope invert() missing dart-sass module-specific behavior: Dart module invert (lines 460-472) checks if result is SassString and emits Deprecation.colorModuleCompat warning for number arguments. Port invertFn is shared between global and module scope and doesn't distinguish. Also, module-scope alpha() in Dart (lines 551-598) has different behavior than global: it emits Deprecation.colorModuleCompat warning for Microsoft filter usage, and throws different error messages. Port's moduleAlphaFn (line 1887) is a simple wrapper that doesn't do any of this.

SassColor.changeRgb, changeHsl, changeHwb deprecated methods not ported: Dart color.dart:812-863. These are deprecated but dart-sass still supports them for backwards compatibility. ISS-271 already tracks this.

EvaluateVisitor missing _runFunctionCallable/_runBuiltInCallable: Dart _runFunctionCallable (lines 3602-3675) is the main dispatch for all function calls handling UserDefined, BuiltIn, and PlainCss callables with proper environment scoping, _addExceptionSpan wrapping, and _withoutSlash on results. _runBuiltInCallable (lines 3676-3938) handles overloaded built-ins, rest argument assembly via _addRestMap, and _verifyArguments. The Scala port inlines some of this logic in visitFunctionExpression but lacks the full structured dispatch.

Module-scope opacity() missing Dart module-specific behavior: Dart module opacity (lines 601-616) checks if argument is SassNumber and emits Deprecation.colorModuleCompat warning with recommendation, then returns function string passthrough. Port moduleOpacityFn (line 1884) just does assertColor().alpha without any SassNumber check or deprecation warning.

EvaluateVisitor missing _applyMixin: Dart _applyMixin (lines 2113-2185) handles UserDefined mixins with ContentBlock scoping, BuiltIn mixins with acceptsContent validation, environment content setting, and _addExceptionTrace wrapping. The Scala _invokeMixinCallable covers the core but lacks ContentBlock closure environment capture (mixin body should run in caller's content-block environment for & resolution).

StringExpression.toString delegates to asInterpolation in dart-sass (string.dart:134) but Scala port uses a simplified inline version. Without asInterpolation the static=true escape-hash logic is missing.
StringExpression._quoteInnerText missing static parameter and hash-interpolation escaping from dart-sass string.dart:87-118. When static=true, hash-lbrace sequences should be escaped with backslash.

IfConditionExpression.toInterpolation not ported on any subtype. In dart-sass if.dart, each IfCondition subtype implements toInterpolation(AstNode) using InterpolationBuffer. Scala port has no toInterpolation on IfConditionExpression hierarchy.

Module-scope grayscale() missing Dart module-specific behavior: Dart module grayscale (lines 494-508) checks if argument is SassNumber and emits Deprecation.colorModuleCompat warning with recommendation, then returns function string. Port moduleGrayscaleFn (lines 1870-1881) only handles the color path, not the SassNumber passthrough path.

EvaluateVisitor missing infrastructure methods: _withStackFrame (lines 4619-4633), _addExceptionSpan (lines 4734-4753), _addExceptionTrace (lines 4755-4771), _addErrorSpan (lines 4772-4785), _exception (lines 4701-4710), _multiSpanException (lines 4712-4732), _warn (lines 4681-4699), _withoutSlash (lines 4635-4680 with slash-div deprecation recommendation), _withParent with through parameter (lines 4511-4530), _copyParentAfterSibling (lines 4531-4544), _hasCssNesting (lines 353-365). These affect error reporting quality, deprecation messaging, and CSS nesting detection.

EvaluateVisitor CssVisitor methods are all stubs throwing UnsupportedOperationException: visitCssAtRule, visitCssComment, visitCssDeclaration, visitCssImport, visitCssKeyframeBlock, visitCssMediaRule, visitCssStyleRule, visitCssStylesheet, visitCssSupportsRule. Dart original (lines 4017-4869) has full implementations that handle @import ordering, media query merging, style rule nesting detection, and declaration emission into the modifiable CSS tree. These are needed for _combineCss to work which visits CSS nodes from loaded modules.

AtRootQuery.excludes(CssParentNode) not ported on AtRootQuery class. Dart at_root_query.dart:67-80 has excludes method that pattern-matches CssStyleRule/CssMediaRule/CssSupportsRule/CssAtRule. Currently inlined in EvaluateVisitor but should be on AtRootQuery for fidelity.
AtRootQuery.parse factory not ported. Dart at_root_query.dart:58-64 delegates to AtRootQueryParser. Port when parser module is finalized.

EvaluateVisitor missing _warnForBogusCombinators (lines 2486-2536): validates that style rule selectors don't contain leading/trailing combinators (e.g. '> .a >' or '.a >'). Emits 'bogus-combinators' deprecation. Without this, invalid selectors pass through silently.

Module-scope hwb() missing Dart overloaded 4-arg signature: Dart module hwb (lines 511-530) has two overloads via overloadedFunction: 4-arg form (,,,:1) that wraps args into slash-separated list before parsing, and 1-arg form (). Port hwbFn only has a single callback that dispatches on args.length. The 4-arg path in the module should construct the slash-separated list wrapper like Dart does.

ParameterList.verify method not ported. Dart parameter_list.dart:77-123 throws detailed SassScriptException for invalid argument combinations. Port matches() is present but verify() which provides error messages is missing.

SassString.isSpecialNumber missing if(): Dart string.dart:101-102 includes if() as a special number function. Port lines 35-43 omit it. Also, SassString.isSpecialVariable is wrong in two ways: (1) missing attr() and if() which Dart includes (lines 113-119), (2) includes env() which Dart does NOT include. Correct set for isSpecialVariable is {attr(, if(, var(}. Port has {var(, env(}.

SassString.isSpecialNumber/isSpecialVariable min length check not ported: Dart string.dart:71 checks text.length < "min(_)".length (6 chars) before doing character checks for isSpecialNumber. Dart line 111 checks text.length < "var(_)".length for isSpecialVariable. Port uses toLowerCase().startsWith() which implicitly handles this but allocates a new string on every call. Not a correctness bug but performance difference.

Global color functions missing withDeprecationWarning calls: Dart wraps global accessors (red, green, blue, hue, saturation, lightness) with .withDeprecationWarning('color') and manipulation functions (lighten, darken, saturate, desaturate, opacify, transparentize, fade-in, fade-out, adjust-hue, complement) with .withDeprecationWarning('color','adjust'). Port registers functions directly without deprecation warning wrappers. Also missing warnForGlobalBuiltIn calls in grayscale, opacity, invert globals.
ParameterList._originalParameterName not ported. Dart parameter_list.dart:127-138 returns original dollar-sign name with underscores for error messages. Required by verify().
ParameterList.keywordRestParameter field exists in Scala port but not in dart-sass ParameterList. Dart only has restParameter. keywordRestParameter is only on ArgumentList.
ParameterList.parse factory not ported. Dart parameter_list.dart:72-73 delegates to ScssParser.parseParameterList.

lighten/darken/saturate/desaturate use adjustHsl helper which calls hslFrom with hardcoded clamping [0,100] instead of Dart's clampLikeCss. Dart lines 192-198 (lighten) uses clampLikeCss(color.lightness + amount.valueInRange(0,100,'amount'), 0, 100) with valueInRange validating the amount is in [0,100]. Port uses scalar() which doesn't validate range, and adjustHsl which clamps in hslFrom. Also missing the Deprecation.colorFunctions warning with _suggestScaleAndAdjust.

Missing AnySelectorVisitor: Dart any_selector.dart (38 LOC) defines AnySelectorVisitor mixin that returns true if ANY selector node matches. It recurses through complex->compound->simple selectors and checks pseudo.selector. No Scala counterpart exists in SearchVisitors.scala or elsewhere. Used internally by dart-sass for selector predicate checks.

SupportsCondition subtypes toInterpolation methods are simplified stubs using Interpolation.plain(toString, span) instead of proper InterpolationBuffer-based construction. Comments say 'Simplified: full version uses InterpolationBuffer'. This loses interpolation structure.

CssStyleRule.selector typed as Any instead of SelectorList. Comments say 'SelectorList is represented as Any until the selector AST is ported' but selector AST IS ported in ssg-sass/ast/selector/. Should be typed as SelectorList.

SerializeVisitor visitCssMediaRule simplified: Dart _visitMediaQuery (lines 307-329) formats media queries with modifier/type/conditions, handles 'not' condition prefix stripping, and uses conjunction flag to pick 'and' vs 'or' operator. Scala just does node.queries.mkString(', ') which skips all of this formatting. This causes incorrect media query output for queries with modifiers (e.g. 'only screen and (min-width: 768px)'), negated conditions, and disjunctive queries.

opacify()/transparentize() use scalar() for amount instead of Dart's assertNumber('amount').valueInRangeWithUnit(0,1,'amount','') which validates amount is in [0,1] with unit '' (empty). Port scalar() has no range validation. Dart also uses clampLikeCss for the final alpha, and emits Deprecation.colorFunctions + _suggestScaleAndAdjust.

CssNode.isInvisible/isInvisibleOtherThanBogusCombinators/isInvisibleHidingComments return hardcoded false. Dart node.dart:34-52 delegates to _IsInvisibleVisitor with includeBogus/includeComments flags. The full _IsInvisibleVisitor visitor logic is missing.

SerializeVisitor visitCssComment missing _minimumIndentation/reindentation for comments: Dart visitCssComment (lines 196-218) checks _minimumIndentation on multi-line comments and re-indents them relative to current indentation via _writeWithIndent. Scala just appends node.text verbatim. Multi-line comments inside nested rules will have incorrect indentation in expanded mode.

adjust-hue() uses raw args(1).assertNumber().value for degrees instead of Dart's _angleValue(arguments[1],'degrees') which handles angle unit coercion (deg/rad/grad/turn) and emits deprecation warning for non-angle units. Port line 1023 just takes .value, losing unit conversion. Also missing Dart's deprecation warning with suggestedValue in SassNumber(degrees,'deg') format.
CssNode.toString not ported. Dart node.dart:54 delegates to serialize(this, inspect: true). Scala port uses default Object.toString.

SerializeVisitor missing _writeImportUrl: Dart (lines 277-294) strips url() wrapper in compressed mode and adds quotes if needed. Scala visitCssImport just writes node.url.value directly without any compressed-mode URL optimization.
CssMediaQuery.parseList factory not ported. Dart media_query.dart:45-54 delegates to MediaQueryParser.

Interpolation validation is relaxed compared to Dart. Dart interpolation.dart:107-114 validates that String elements have null spans and Expression elements have non-null spans. Scala port only checks for adjacent strings and valid types.

SerializeVisitor missing visitCalculation: Dart visitCalculation (lines 520-526) and _writeCalculationValue (lines 527-579) handle first-class calculation serialization with parenthesization rules via _parenthesizeCalculationRhs (lines 605-615) and _writeCalculationUnits (lines 580-604). Scala has no calculation-specific serialization - SassCalculation.toString is used instead, which may not match dart-sass output formatting.

FindDependenciesVisitor missing visitInterpolation/visitSupportsCondition overrides: Dart original (line 47) explicitly overrides visitInterpolation and visitSupportsCondition as no-ops to prevent RecursiveStatementVisitor base class from recursing into them (since FindDependencies only cares about top-level statements). Scala port omits these but this is minor since Scala RecursiveStatementVisitor does not recurse into interpolations anyway (it's also a stub).

complement() implementation differs from Dart in channel index logic: Dart complement (lines 813-861) checks space.isLegacy to decide whether hue is channel 0 (legacy HSL) or channel 2 (modern LCH/OKLCH). Port line 1044 also does this but uses _adjustChannel which adds 180 to the hue. The Dart version uses _adjustChannel which properly handles missing channels (calling _missingChannelError) and normalizes via channelFromValue. Port's doAdjustChannel does handle missing channels but the complement-specific logic should be verified for all polar spaces.

functionString helper uses toCssString(quote=false) which strips quotes from SassString values. Dart _functionString (line 1330) uses toCssString() which preserves quotes. This causes behavioral difference when quoted strings appear in CSS function arguments.

addSelector missing try-catch error wrapping: Dart extension_store.dart lines 193-205 wrap _extendList in try-catch that rethrows SassException with additional context (From error.span.message). Scala addSelector line 265-270 has no try-catch so SassExceptions propagate without the From context prefix.

invert() space-aware path differs from Dart: Port line 1124-1125 parses spaceArg as InterpolationMethod.fromValue but Dart line 904-907 uses ColorSpace.fromName(arguments[2].assertString('space').assertUnquoted('space').text, 'space'). The port allows passing an interpolation method descriptor where Dart expects a plain color space name. Also, Dart lines 890-901 handle the legacy no-space path with _checkPercent(weightNumber,'weight') and _mixLegacy; port uses mixColors with scalar().
NumberUtil header comment says SassNumber functions deferred to Phase 9 but they ARE ported in MathFunctions.scala and SassCalculation.scala. Update comment to reflect actual location.

_extendExistingExtensions swallows SassException instead of rethrowing with additional span: Dart extension_store.dart lines 344-361 catch SassException and rethrow via error.withAdditionalSpan(extension.extender.selector.span, target selector). Scala _extendExistingExtensions lines 475-478 catch SassException and silently set selectors to null, losing the error entirely. Should rethrow with additional span context.

doChangeColor alpha handling missing deprecation warning for non-% units: Dart _changeColor lines 1106-1118 emits Deprecation.functionUnits warning when alpha has units other than %. Port doChangeColor lines 1427-1435 handles unitless and % but falls through to valueInRange without the deprecation warning for other units.

SourceMapBuffer missing buildSourceMap() from source_map_buffer.dart:152-185 which builds a SingleMapping from accumulated entries with optional prefix offset. Also missing: _addEntry() deduplication logic (lines 59-78) that skips redundant same-line entries, _writeLine() (lines 130-142) that trims useless entries and re-adds span entries at line boundaries, writeAll() (line 96-97), clear() throwing UnsupportedError (line 80-81). Port currently has no way to export source map data.

_extendExistingSelectors swallows SassException instead of rethrowing with context: Dart extension_store.dart lines 408-424 catch SassException and rethrow with additional context message (From selector.value.span.message). Scala _extendExistingSelectors lines 512-519 catch SassException and silently discard it. Should rethrow with context message matching Dart behavior.

doAdjustChannel alpha deprecation warning differs from Dart: Dart _adjustChannel lines 1278-1292 emits Deprecation.functionUnits warning when alpha has units (other than %) with specific message about unitSuggestion. Port doAdjustChannel line 1557-1559 silently strips units without warning.

SourceMapBuffer.forSpan() records entry only when not already in span (line 83: if !inSpan), but original (line 45) ALWAYS adds the entry regardless and only saves/restores the inSpan flag. The original records the span.start mapping on every forSpan call; the port skips it for nested spans. This means nested source map entries are lost.

_trim missing rotateSlice for duplicate originals: Dart extension_store.dart lines 1038-1043 when a duplicate original is found at index j, calls rotateSlice(result, 0, j+1) to move the element at position j to position 0 before continuing outer. Scala _trim lines 841-851 simply detects the duplicate and skips it (sets dup=true) without rotating. This can produce different selector ordering when a style rule extends a component of its own selector.

keywords() falls back to empty map for non-SassArgumentList inputs instead of throwing error. Dart meta.dart line 81 throws ': X is not an argument list.' for non-arglist inputs. Port line 194 returns SassMap.empty, which silently hides type errors.

FileSpan missing withoutInitialIdentifier() from span.dart:55-59. The original uses _scanIdentifier to skip past an identifier (including backslash escapes via consumeEscapedCharacter) and returns the remainder. Port has initialIdentifier() but no withoutInitialIdentifier(). Also, the ported initialIdentifier (SourceSpan.scala:234-243) uses simple isLetter/isLetterOrDigit checks instead of using CharCode.isName/isNameStart with backslash-escape handling via _scanIdentifier pattern.

Parameter.originalName is simplified. Dart parameter.dart:30-31 uses declarationName(span) when defaultValue is non-null to extract the dollar-prefixed name from source text. Scala port returns span.text in both cases.

FileSpan missing context property from Dart's FileSpan interface (span.dart:26 delegates to span.context). Also missing compareTo() and union() delegate methods from the Dart FileSpan interface. These are part of the Dart source_span package contract.

global-variable-exists() does not distinguish global vs local scope: Dart evaluator's global-variable-exists checks the GLOBAL scope specifically (not local scope chain). Port line 217 uses envFor() then variableExists() which searches the full scope chain. This means local variables will incorrectly report as existing globally.
ArgumentList.namedSpans keys ordering not validated. Dart argument_list.dart:51 asserts iterableEquals(named.keys, namedSpans.keys). Scala port has no such assertion.

MergedExtension does not set Extender._extension backlink: Dart merged_extension.dart lines 53-59 constructor calls super() which invokes the Extension constructor body that sets this.extender._extension = this. Scala MergedExtension (lines 118-131) calls the primary Extension constructor directly (new Extension(new Extender(...), ...)) which does NOT set the _extension backlink. Only Extension.apply factory sets it. This means assertCompatibleMediaContext on a MergedExtension extender will always return without checking media context compatibility because _extension is Nullable.empty.

module list includes many runtime-context functions (variable-exists, function-exists, mixin-exists, global-variable-exists, content-exists, module-variables, module-functions, module-mixins, get-function, get-mixin, call) in both global AND module lists. Dart meta.dart only puts feature-exists, inspect, type-of, keywords in the shared list. The runtime functions are defined in the evaluator, not in meta.dart. Port's module() = global ::: moduleOnly means these runtime functions are duplicated.

SourceSpan.scala between() (line 196) does not validate that the two spans are in the same file or that this.end <= other.start, unlike original span.dart:91-98 which throws ArgumentError for both conditions. Same validation gap in before() (line 200 vs original 105-113) and after() (line 204 vs original 119-128). Also contains() (line 208) does not validate same-file unlike original (line 135-138).

bogusSpan constant from span.dart:17 (SourceFile.decoded([]).span(0)) is not declared in SourceSpan.scala. It exists as a local val in ExtendFunctions.scala:602 as FileSpan.synthetic("") but should be a shared constant for consistency with original.
